title: lobelia erinus
intro: Lobelia erinus, also known as the blue lobelia or lobelia, is a flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant contains compounds like lobeline, which has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. Lobelia erinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to treat conditions such as colds, fever, and skin irritations.
